copy.seoDescription: How we built the site and the AI behind it, and the results it drove for a business like yours.

sections.headline: [PLACEHOLDER: Result in one line]
sections.body: We built the website and the AI behind it. Here is what changed.
sections.flags: PLACEHOLDER: client name, industry/location, and headline result (e.g. '3x more booked calls in 60 days').

sections.headline: What was slowing them down
sections.body: [PLACEHOLDER: The old site looked dated and leads went unanswered.] [PLACEHOLDER: Replies took hours, so prospects went cold.] [PLACEHOLDER: The owner handled everything by hand.]
sections.flags: PLACEHOLDER: 2-3 lines describing what was broken before we started, in the client's words.

sections.headline: The site and the AI behind it
sections.subhead: One team, one stack, built to convert and run on its own.
bullets: [PLACEHOLDER: New website built to load fast and convert]
[PLACEHOLDER: WhatsApp AI agent answering 24/7 in their language]
[PLACEHOLDER: Lead qualification and booking handled automatically]
[PLACEHOLDER: Automations connecting their tools and CRM]
[PLACEHOLDER: Ongoing updates and support after launch]
sections.flags: PLACEHOLDER: 3-5 bullets of what was actually delivered for this client.

sections.headline: Numbers after launch
bullets: [PLACEHOLDER: X hours saved per week] on manual replies
[PLACEHOLDER: X% faster response time], answered in seconds
sections.flags: PLACEHOLDER: 3 metric cards. Each needs a real number and timeframe before publishing. [REVIEW: confirm every metric with client data].

sections.headline: What the client said
sections.body: "[PLACEHOLDER: Short quote about the result and what it felt like to work with us, 2-3 lines max.]"
sections.flags: PLACEHOLDER: real quote + attribution (name, role, company). Do not publish without sign-off.

sections.headline: Want results like these
sections.subhead: Tell us what you sell. We will show you the site and the AI to match.
